title: Standup with Theerth — Contxt build
summary: Daily 10:00 IST standup with Theerth K.R. to sync on the Contxt hackathon build ahead of the 2026-07-11 deadline.
body: Recurring 15-min standup. Focus: Gateway classifier, MCP get_context, and the SvelteKit context viewer.

title: Contxt architecture — two-tier model
summary: Contxt is a portable, privacy-first context layer. Two tiers: PRIVATE (crown jewels, on-device Gemma, E2E encrypted, cloud is a blind relay) and SHARED (cloud Gemma, cloud-readable by any AI). The Crown-Jewels Gateway routes each item and is the trust boundary.
body: Pipeline: Ingest (Gmail + Calendar + Notion) -> Gateway (on-device tier decision) -> Distill (local/cloud Gemma -> context cards) -> Store -> Serve over MCP (get_context / draft_reply) -> any AI.

title: Doctor appointment — blood test report
summary: Follow-up appointment on 2026-07-14 to review a blood test report. Health-sensitive; classified PRIVATE and kept on-device.
body: Reminder from the clinic. Bring the previous prescription. Fasting sample required before 09:00.
